prompts:
/plan "implement authention in the plugin app with convex and clerk. Here is a convex and clerk documentation url that may help. We 
have created the clerk application and added values to the environment file. We haven't added in the clerk libraries. 
https://docs.convex.dev/auth/clerk"

/plan "fix the runtime errors in the plugin app. The domains for the clerk scripts are calling and maybe some other things need to be added to the manifest.json file following the standard for version 3. We need permission to access certain domains and also loading remote javascript will be an issue, so we likely need to include it directly in the dist folder to load and package it with the plugin. Remember the plugin project is a google chrome extension using manifest version 3 and has many restrictions we need to work with."
